entities.name: Gmail
entities.context: email service used for managing travel reservations

entities.name: Flight Filter LLM
entities.context: language model used to filter flight information

entities.name: Flight Extractor LLM
entities.context: language model used to extract flight details

entities.name: trips.jsonl
entities.context: file format for storing trip data

entities.name: React Frontend Dashboard
entities.context: user interface for displaying trip information

relationships.context: Gmail is used by the Scheduled Agent for travel reservations
Scheduled Agent uses Flight Filter LLM to filter flight information
Flight Filter LLM determines if information is ignored
Flight Filter LLM redirects to Flight Extractor LLM for recognized flights
Flight Extractor LLM uses trip_store.py to process flight information
trips.jsonl data is accessed through API: GET /status
API: GET /status is used to retrieve data for React Frontend Dashboard
